summary: Verified SideNav dark-mode invert behavior across Home, HowItWorks, and pages without dark sections. All computed colors match expected values and transition-duration is 500ms. Mobile viewport unaffected.
critical_code_review_comments: SideNav.jsx useEffect: cleanupRef is declared AFTER requestAnimationFrame closure that assigns to it — works due to JS hoisting/closure timing since RAF fires next frame, but declaring cleanupRef BEFORE the RAF would be clearer and more robust.
seed_data_creation: Set localStorage.thrumline_consent_v1='accepted' to dismiss banner during tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: SideNav dark-mode invert verified. Home: light→dark→light around The Promise section works. HowItWorks: hiw-paragraph-3 triggers invert. What-we-do/signals/fit/privacy stay in light-ink palette. Rule bg transitions from rgba(23,24,26,0.1) → rgba(244,245,247,0.25). Active link: rgb(244,245,247), inactive: rgba(244,245,247,0.55). Transition duration 0.5s applied. Mobile side-nav display:none confirmed.
